hero.title: Maison Amie
hero.subtitle: Your home in the heart of the Languedoc

welcome.title: A place to love
welcome.text: Maison Amie is a beautiful country house near the picturesque village of Revel in South France. Enjoy six unique suites, a lush garden and unforgettable experiences in the heart of the Languedoc.

rooms.title: Our suites
rooms.subtitle: Six unique accommodations, each with its own character

activities.title: Experience more
activities.subtitle: From bread baking to kayaking — fill your days with memories

location.title: Near Revel
location.text: Enjoy the tranquility of the countryside, just a stone's throw from the charming market town of Revel and the Lac de Saint-Ferréol. A perfect base for exploring the Languedoc, the Black Mountains and Carcassonne.

cta.title: Ready for an unforgettable stay?
cta.subtitle: Book your suite and experience the magic of South France

accommodation.title: Our suites
accommodation.subtitle: Six unique spaces, each furnished with care and attention to detail

activities.title: Activities
activities.subtitle: Fill your days with authentic experiences around Maison Amie
activities.noSlots: No available time slots for this date

garden.name: Kitchen Garden Workshop
garden.description: Learn everything about growing vegetables and herbs in our beautiful kitchen garden. Suitable for beginners and experienced gardeners.

bike.name: Bike Rental
bike.description: Explore the area at your own pace. We offer electric and regular bikes for rides through the Languedoc.

kayak.name: Kayaking
kayak.description: An unforgettable day on the water at Lac de Saint-Ferréol or on the river. Guide included, no experience required.

bread.name: Bread Baking
bread.description: Bake your own bread in our traditional oven. From kneading the dough to a crusty loaf fresh from the oven.

pizza.name: Wood-fired Pizza
pizza.description: Bake pizza in our wood-fired stone oven. Create your pizza from scratch and enjoy it together at the table.

booking.title: Book your stay
booking.subtitle: Choose your suite and preferred dates
booking.name: Name
booking.messagePlaceholder: Do you have any special wishes or questions? Let us know.
booking.success: Your request has been received! We will contact you within 24 hours to confirm your booking.
booking.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact us by phone.

contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

ical.description: Add an iCal link from Booking.com or Airbnb to automatically update availability.

footer.description: A beautiful country house near Revel in South France. Six unique suites, a lush garden and unforgettable experiences.
